raw_consumer_statement:
Home Depot is reporting two purchases on a card ( ending in XXXX ) which I have never had in my possession : {$380.00} in XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/, & {$120.00} in a XXXX Home Depot on XX/XX/. I have advised Home Depot that I never had that card, & that I did not make those charges. 

Home Depot removed the {$120.00} from my statement but the {$380.00} charge is still showing. I have changed my account password to help prevent this type of fraud in the future.

Home Depot is now tracking a new card # XXXX on my account. I have not received the referenced card.
